description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unix CI that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, ubuntu-latest, macos-12), compilers (llvm-13.0.0, clang++-14, gcc-11), C++ standards (14, 17, 20, 23), and build types (Release, Debug). For each job, check out the repository, set up C++ with the specified compiler and tools, install dependencies, configure CMake, build the project, and run tests with ctest.
